qb_required_note: QuickBooks Desktop (Pro/Premier/Enterprise) must be installed on this machine. QB version 2019+ recommended.
toast_required_note: A valid Toast account is required. Sign in once through the app to establish a session.
google_required_note: Google Drive connection requires a one-time authorization inside the app. No manual file placement required.
features: Download Reports — Guided wizard, Playwright browser automation
QB Sync — Guided wizard, pre-sync gate with 6 safety checks
Drive Coverage — Verify report completeness before sync
Recovery Center — One-click health checks and repair
Operator Mode — Standard (guided) or Admin (full access)
Safe Mode — Crash recovery and safe restart
release_notes: Home Dashboard upgraded to App Brain — readiness cards show status, reason, and next step
Guided wizards replace raw tabs as default operator experience
Consolidated pre-sync gate blocks QB sync if source files are missing
Standard operator mode shows only 5 navigation items
Result screens show outcome type: Completed / Completed with Warnings / Failed Safely
Technical complexity hidden behind collapsible sections in Recovery Center
Client-safe copy throughout — no raw technical language in normal flows
app.py reduced from 6661 to 956 lines across 3 sprints
